en: What is this? It's a pencil.
What is that? It's a tree.
What are these? They are my cats.
What are those? They are my books.
What time do you sleep? I sleep at eleven o'clock.
What time does Ayşe sleep? She sleeps at twelve o'clock.

tr: Murat saat kaçta uyanıyor? Saat 7:30 da
en: What time does Murat wake up? He wakes up at half past seven.

tr: Sen saat kaçta uyanıyorsun? Saat 8 de
en: What time do you wake up? I wake up at eight o'clock.
What time do they wake up? They wake up at quarter past seven.

tr: Siz akşam yemeğini saat kaçta yiyorsunuz? Saat 7:30 da
en: What time do you have dinner? We have dinner at half past seven.

tr: Sen kahvaltını saat kaçta yapıyorsun? Saat 8:45 de
en: What time do you have breakfast? I have breakfast at  quarter to nine.

tr: Ayşe öğlen yemeğini saat kaçta yiyor? Saat 11:45 de
en: What time does Ayşe have lunch? She has lunch at  quarter to twelve.

tr: Öğlen yemeğini saat kaçta yiyorsunuz? Saat 12:00 de
en: What time do you have lunch? We have lunch at twelve o'clock.

tr: Biz akşam yemeğini saat kaçta yiyoruz? Saat 6:30 da
en: What time do we have dinner? We have dinner at half past six.

tr: Ayşe saat kaçta okula gidiyor? Saat 8:45 de
en: What time does Ayşe go to the school? She goes to thee school at quarter to nine.

tr: Ayşe okuldan saat kaçta geliyor? Saat 4:50 de
en: What time does Ayşe come from the school? She comes from the school at ten to five.

tr: Siz ne zaman Almanya'ya gidiyorsunuz? Eylül de
en: When do you go to Germany? We go to Germany in September.

tr: Onlar ne zaman Türkiye'ye geliyor? Ekim de
en: When do they come to Turkey? They come to Turkey in October.

tr: Senin en sevdiğin yemek ne? Pizza
en: What is your favorite food? It's pizza.

tr: Ayşe'nin en sevdiği yemek ne? Hamburger
en: What is Ayşe's favorite food? It's hamburger.

tr: Senin en sevdiğin renk ne? Yeşil
en: What is your favorite color? It's green.

tr: Senin en sevdiğin araba ne? Audi
en: What is your favorite car? It's Audi.
What color are your eyes? They are black.
What color are Ayşe's eyes? They are green.
What color are Murat's eyes? They are brown.
What color are your trousers? They are blue.
What color is your car? It's red.
What do you eat? I eat the salad.
What do you want? I want two glasses of water.
What do you drink? I drink a bottle of cola.

tr: Ne yemek istersin? Bir kase çorba
en: What do you want to eat? I want to eat a bowl of soup.

tr: Ne izlemek istersin? İyi bir film
en: What do you want to watch? I want to watch a good movie.

tr: Ali ne içmek ister? Bir bardak cola
en: What does Ali want to drink? He wants to drink a glass of cola.

tr: Onlar ne istiyor? Bizimle oynamak istiyorlar.
en: What do they want? They want to play with us.
What do you want? I want to come with you.
What does Ali want? He wants to play with his friends.

tr: Ne satın alıyorsun? İyi bir araba
en: What do you buy? I buy a good car.

tr: Annen pazardan ne satın alıyor? Domates ve salatalık
en: What does your mother buy from the market? She buys tomatoes and cucumbers.
Where are you? I'm at home.
Where are they? They are in the hospital.

Where do we go? We go to the garden in the village.

Where does Ali go? He goes to his grandfather.
Where do they go? They go to the holiday.

tr: Siz tatil için nereye gidiyorsunuz? Bodrum
en: Where do you go for holiday? We go to Bodrum.

tr: Bu yaz tatil için nereye gidiyorsunuz? Fethiye'ye
en: Where do you go for holiday this summer? We go to Fethiye.
Where do you want to go? We want to go to Europe.

tr: Öğlen yemeği için nereye gitmek istersiniz? İyi bir restorana
en: Where do you want to go for lunch? We want to go to a good restaurant.

tr: Dünyada nereyi görmek istersin? New York’u
en: Where do you want to see in the world? I want to see New York.
Where do you want to see in Turkey? I want to see Adana.
When do you sleep? I sleep at twelve o'clock.

tr: Senin çocukların ne zaman gelir? Öğlenleyin
en: When do your children come? They come at noon.

tr: Senin kedilerin ne zaman süt içer? Sabah 9’da
en: When do your cats drink milk? They drink milk at nine in the morning.
When do you wake up in the morning? I wake up at half past seven.
When do they come? They come in two days.
When do we go? We go this week.
When do they go? They go tomorrow.
How are you? I'm tired.
How are you? I'm angry.
How are you? I'm happy.
How is Ali? He is fine.
How is Ayşe? She is bad.
How are your friends? They are angry.
How are your children? They are fine.
How is your cat? It isn't good.
How is your job? It's so-so.
How is Ankara? It's very cold.
How is Istanbul? It's very bad.

How is the weather? It's rainy.
How is the weather? It's sunny.
How is the weather in Istanbul? It's very hot.
How is the weather in Ankara? It's very cold.

en: Why are you here? Because I want to learn English.
Why do you go? Because I want to go.
Why do they go? Because they are tired.
Why does Ali go? Because he is unhappy.

tr: Siz niye onlarla buluşuyorsunuz? Çünkü onlar komik
en: Why do you meet with them? Because they are funny.

tr: Sen niye ingilizce öğrenmek istiyorsun? Çünkü ingilizce önemlidir
en: Why do you want to learn English? Because English is important.

Who does Ali want to see? He wants to see us.
Who wants to play with us? The children want to play with us.

Who loves us? Everybody loves us.
Who do we love? We love the children.

tr: Sen kim için çalışıyorsun? Onlar için
en: Who do you work for? I work for them.

tr: Onlar kimin için çalışıyor? Bizim için
en: Who do they work for? They work for us.
Whose car is this? It's the car of my mother.

tr: Sen kimin arabasını sürüyorsun? Babamın arabasını
en: Whose car do you drive? I drive the car of my father.
Whose money do you spend? I spend the money of my father.
Which car is yours? That car is mine.
Which one is your car? The blue one is mine.

Which books are mine? The old ones are mine.

tr: Sen hangi telefonu satın almak istiyorsun? iPhone
en: Which phone do you want to buy? I want to buy an iPhone.

en: Which car do you want to buy? I want to buy a Mercedes.

en: Which city do you want to visit in Turkey? I want to visit Gaziantep.
